markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To align on content production workflow and resolve review bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Review Bottleneck:** Brooke's 30-min/article review time is the primary bottleneck. The goal is to reduce this to 5–10 minutes by improving GrowthX's content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [**New Review Strategy:** To accelerate calibration, Brooke will prioritize reviewing the newest articles. This provides faster feedback on the latest pipeline improvements, allowing GrowthX to apply fixes to the entire backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [**Centralized Airtable Workflow:** All approvals will move to Airtable. New statuses (`Client Approved`, `Needs Revisions`) and automated Slack notifications will create a single source of truth and streamline the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**TLDRs Replaced:** The generic "TLDR" summary will be replaced with a custom, on-brand alternative. This preserves LLM visibility while aligning with You.com's voice.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** Brooke's 30-minute review time per article is the main production bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [**Goal:** Reduce review time to 5–10 minutes by improving GrowthX's content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [**Root Causes:**](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
      - [Repetitive sentences and robotic phrasing.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
      - [Bulleted lists "flattened" into paragraphs without transitions.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**New Review Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
      - [**Prioritize New Content:** Review the most recent articles first.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
          - [**Why:** This provides faster feedback on the latest pipeline improvements, enabling GrowthX to apply fixes to the entire backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
      - [**Provide Actionable Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
          - [**Granular:** Specific examples of issues.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
          - [**High-Level:** Overarching patterns (e.g., "choppy sentences").](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
          - [**Why:** This allows GrowthX's managing editor, Jana, to update the AI pipeline's writing guidelines, preventing recurrence.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)

### Workflow & Tooling

  - [**Problem:** The current approval process is fragmented across Slack and Airtable, causing confusion.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Solution:** Centralize all approvals in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**New Airtable Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**New Statuses:** `Client Approved` and `Needs Revisions`.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
      - [**Automated Notifications:** Slack notifications will alert Brooke when an article is ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
      - [**Revision Handling:**](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
          - [**Minor Edits:** Use the `Needs Revisions` status. Add a doc comment: "Good to publish after edits."](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
          - [**Major Edits:** Use the `Needs Revisions` status. The article will return to Brooke for a second review.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [**Airtable Interfaces:** Bailey will create custom interfaces to simplify Brooke's view of the Airtable base.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
      - [**Why:** To provide a clear overview of the content pipeline and pending tasks, reducing information overload.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

### Content Strategy & Logistics

  - [**Topic Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [**Problem:** The topic queue is low, but this is acceptable while Brooke catches up on reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
      - [**Solution:** Brooke shared a keyword analysis doc to align on priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will cross-reference this with GrowthX's research to build a new topic list.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [**TLDR Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Problem:** The "TLDR" tag feels off-brand.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [**Solution:** Replace it with a custom, branded summary.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
      - [**Why:** To preserve LLM visibility (which favors front-loaded summaries) while maintaining brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**PSEO Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
      - [**Decision:** Postpone the programmatic SEO (PSEO) discussion until January.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
      - [**Why:** Brooke's current workload makes scaling content a low priority.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [**Reporting Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
      - [**Schedule:** Monthly deep-dive reports will be delivered the last week of the month for the prior month's data.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
      - [**Why:** To align with Brooke's internal reporting cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [**Image Resizing:**](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
      - [**Problem:** Images in Webflow require manual resizing.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will check with the publishing ops team to ensure correct sizes are pulled in automatically.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brooke:**](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
      - [Prioritize reviewing the newest articles first.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
      - [Provide granular and high-level feedback to accelerate calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
      - [Use the new Airtable statuses for all approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Create `Client Approved` and `Needs Revisions` statuses in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
      - [Set up automated Slack notifications for review tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
      - [Build custom Airtable interfaces for topic approval and pipeline overview.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
      - [Send a decision tree for the new Airtable approval workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
      - [Cross-reference keyword lists to build the next topic queue.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
      - [Check with the publishing ops team about the image resizing issue.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
      - [Request GPT prompt tips from the designer for creating on-brand images.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
      - [Send an async update next week.](https://fathom.video/share/o_JRMmLcyDH3miksE4De15SMsUsWiAUz?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
